zh.lifeSummary: 當Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur於1340年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾格林利方時，他的父親Tudor Goch ap Gronwy40歲，母親Morfudd ferch Hywel16歲。他於1382年與Nest ferch Cynwrig在威爾士凱爾納方史爾格林利方結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur于1340年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾格林利方时，他的父亲Tudor Goch ap Gronwy40岁，母亲Morfudd ferch Hywel16岁。他于1382年与Nest ferch Cynwrig在威尔士凱爾納方史爾格林利方结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Tudur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tudor
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

en.lifeSummary: When Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur was born in 1340, in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Tudor Goch ap Gronwy, was 40 and his mother, Morfudd ferch Hywel, was 16. He married Nest ferch Cynwrig in 1382, in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1404, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur est né en 1340, à Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Tudor Goch ap Gronwy, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Morfudd ferch Hywel, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Nest ferch Cynwrig en 1382, à Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1404, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur 1340 in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tudor Goch ap Gronwy 40 und seine Mutter Morfudd ferch Hywel 16. Er hat 1382 in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales Nest ferch Cynwrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1404 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur è nato il nel 1340 nel Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Tudor Goch ap Gronwy, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Morfudd ferch Hywel, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Nest ferch Cynwrig nel 1382, nel Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1404, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudurが1340年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアグリンリフォンで生まれた時，父Tudor Goch ap Gronwyは40歳，母Morfudd ferch Hywelは16歳であった。1382年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアグリンリフォンでNest ferch Cynwrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年に64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur(이)가 1340년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 그린리폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tudor Goch ap Gronwy(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Morfudd ferch Hywel(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1382년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 그린리폰에서 Nest ferch Cynwrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur nasceu em 1340, em Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Tudor Goch ap Gronwy, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Morfudd ferch Hywel, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Nest ferch Cynwrig em 1382, em Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1404, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur родился в 1340 г. в местности глинллифон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Tudor Goch ap Gronwy было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Morfudd ferch Hywel, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Nest ferch Cynwrig в 1382 г. в местности глинллифон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1404 г. в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hwlcyn Llwyd ap Tudur nació en 1340, en Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Tudor Goch ap Gronwy, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Morfudd ferch Hywel, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Nest ferch Cynwrig en 1382, en Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1404, a la edad de 64 años.
